Title: Storm Flag Food Service

Title: Request for Information - Radiopharmaceuticals for Naval Medical Center Portsmouth, VA, Naval Medical Center Camp Lejeune, NC, and Naval Health Clinic Jacksonville, FL
Description: This is a Request for Information (RFI) to identify potential sources possessing the capabilities described herein and ascertain whether the required supplies are commercial in nature. This RFI is issued solely for information and planning purposes and does not constitute a solicitation. Neither unsolicited proposals nor any other kind of offer will be considered in response to this RFI. Responses to this notice are not offers and will not be accepted by the Government to form a binding contract. In keeping with the standards of FAR Part 10, the Government may request additional information from responders. Responders are solely responsible for all expenses associated with responding to this RFI or any follow-up information request. All information received in response to this RFI or any follow-up information request that is marked Proprietary will be handled accordingly. Responses to the RFI will not be returned. At this time, questions concerning the composition and requirements for a future request for proposal will not be entertained. NOTE: Currently no solicitation exists. Therefore, please do not request a copy of the solicitation. NO PHONE CALLS WILL BE ACCEPTED. It is the responsibility of any potential Offeror to monitor this site for the release of any solicitation. RFI Title: Radiopharmaceuticals for the Defense Health Agency (DHA) Multiple Medical Treatment Facilities (MTF). LOCATIONS: Naval Medical Center Portsmouth, Portsmouth, VA 23708, Naval Medical Center Camp Lejeune, Jacksonville, NC and Naval Health Clinic Jacksonville, FL. BACKGROUND: Three (3) Medical Treatment Facility (MTF) Radiology Departments require one new Indefinite Delivery, Indefinite Quantity contract for the delivery of radiopharmaceuticals, as current contracts expire on September 30, 2026. The radiopharmaceuticals need to be delivered on an as needed basis to each requiring Radiology Department. DESCRIPTION: NAICS 325412 Pharmaceutical Preparation Manufacturing, PSC 6505 Drugs and Biologicals. See DRAFT Statement of Work (SOW). RFI SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS: Responses to the RFI shall adhere to the following formatting and outline instructions: All submissions shall be made electronically and be in one of the following formats: Microsoft Word or Adobe PDF. Cover Page (1 page) - Title - Organization - Responder’s technical and administrative points of contact (names, addresses, phone numbers and email addresses). - CAGE Code 3. Capabilities statement SHALL address the following: - Contractor’s clear understanding and ability to perform the scope of this requirement as detailed in the DRAFT SOW. - Contractor’s experience performing the same or similar work as detailed in the DRAFT SOW. - Existing contract vehicles (e.g., GSA schedule) under which the responder currently offers these services, if any. - Whether the responder provides the required services to the general public under terms and conditions similar to those offered to the Federal Government. RESPONSES DUE: Sunday, April 26, 2026 by 5 pm EST SUBMISSION TO: Ms. Carol Uebelacker, carol.e.uebelacker.civ@health.mil

Title: 2026 Arkansas Regional Industry Day
Description: The U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) – Little Rock District will host its annual Industry Day event on April 21–22, 2026, in the Magnolia Ballroom at the Hilton Garden Inn West located at 10914 Kanis Road, Little Rock, Arkansas. This two-day event will provide industry partners the opportunity to network with several government agencies, as well as other large and small business contractors. The event will include a forum to address upcoming business opportunities and will also provide training sessions and panel discussions on important contracting topics. Registered participants will have the opportunity to meet one-on-one with representatives from the USACE Little Rock District, Memphis District, Little Rock Air Force Base, and the U.S. Small Business Administration. This event is open to all industries including: • Construction • Architecture & Engineering Survey • Initial Outfitting • Supplies & Services • and more. Capabilities Briefings: Capabilities briefings will follow an open-floor format and meetings will be conducted on a first-come, first-served basis. Upon arrival, participants will check in with a USACE Contracting Professional and receive a number for each District or Agency table in which they have expressed interest. When your group number is called, you may proceed to the assigned meeting table. Participants are encouraged to bring a capabilities statement to share with government representatives. A concise one- to two-page capabilities statement is recommended, and participants may wish to bring multiple copies for distribution. The agenda for this event is forthcoming. Registration: Registration will open March 16, 2026 at 12:00 PM CT and will close on April 17, 2026 at 5:00 PM CT. See Link below: https://www.cognitoforms.com/SWL3/_2026ArkansasRegionalIndustryDayForum Participants will not automatically receive a confirmation email after registering. If a participant would like confirmation of their registration, they may request one by emailing ceswl-industryday@usace.army.mil. Confirmation requests will be fulfilled within one business day. This is a no-cost public event, and free parking is available onsite at the venue. For questions regarding the event, please email ceswl-industryday@usace.army.mil. Interested Vendors: Please contact Lee Powers via email at LPowers@avcor-usa.com for all inquiries regarding vendor booths. See the link below for Society of American Military Engineers (SAME) sponsored event registration. Disclaimer: This event is for informational and networking purposes only and does not constitute a solicitation or commitment by the Government. Attendance at this event is voluntary and will not provide any advantage or disadvantage in future Government procurements. The tentative agenda has been posted to this announcement.

Title: Notice of Intent to Award Sole Source Contract to Mission Systems Davenport Inc for F-16 Travel Pods
Description: This notice is for informational purposes only. The 114th Fighter Wing Contracting Office, Joe Foss Field, SD, intends to award a sole source contract to Mission Systems Davenport Inc. for MXU-647 Cargo/Travel Pods, Part Number: 402136-3. Please note that this is not a request for competitive quotes. However, all interested parties who believe they can meet the requirement are invited to submit in writing information describing their ability to provide the product listed above. A determination by the Government to compete this requirement based on responses to this notice is solely within the discretion of the Government. Information received will be considered solely for the purpose of determining whether to conduct a competitive procurement..

Title: Enclosed Trailer

Title: St. Louis District US Army Corps of Engineers 2026 Small Business Industry Day
PrimaryContactFullname: Kelsey Daniels, Acting Small Business Deputy
Description: Small businesses are invited to attend the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, St. Louis District Small Business Industry Day on April 16, from 2 to 5 p.m. at the Soldiers Memorial Military Museum in downtown St. Louis. This event offers a valuable opportunity to connect with USACE representatives, learn about upcoming procurement opportunities, and gain insight into how to do business with the agency. The program will feature presentations from the St. Louis District, Memphis District Corps of Engineers, U.S. Army Corps of Engineers, Rock Island District, and U.S. Army Corps of Engineers St. Paul District, along with the U.S. Small Business Administration and APEX Accelerators. Attendees will also hear from a leadership panel and have time to network with key personnel and fellow small business owners. Register by April 13, 2026, to attend: https://forms.osi.apps.mil/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=unZN_HzxUEy5p48xY9J1gpWabFvV-zBLtVnSgXBEwdxUQzROQUZOWEZFNk1GNlo3QVJaN1RKVkszUi4u&fbclid=IwY2xjawRHS5FleHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETFNcndiTnVtZ2dsMjVEVjl3c3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHtO-xXnx8ui3F7ymaIobliSo-J-79E-yo9XTHeetVoS9a3eUjnuyjHIEWeQg_aem_nPYTLvm3ciy0qxMM_H_ybw
